home.heroSubtitle: One platform. One AI. Everything you need to land your next job faster.
home.aiSearchSubtitle: Real jobs, matched to your real skills — see your AI Match % before you apply.
home.highlight1Desc: Browse and filter jobs from real companies — no filler listings.
home.highlight2Desc: Draft a tailored resume or cover letter with AI in seconds.
home.highlight3Desc: Your email and phone are never shown to employers.
home.noFeaturedJobsDesc: Check back soon, or browse every real opening we have today.
home.aiFeaturesTitle: One AI. Every step of your job search.
home.aiFeaturesSubtitle: Real tools, ready to use today — not a roadmap.
home.feature1Desc: Generate an ATS-optimized resume tailored to any role with GPT-4o.
home.feature2Desc: A personalized cover letter backed by real company research, in seconds.
home.feature3Desc: Get direct, actionable career guidance from an AI that knows your real profile.
home.feature4Desc: See how well you fit each role and track your job-search progress over time.
home.howItWorksSubtitle: From guidance to application — every step powered by the same AI.
home.step1Desc: Talk to your AI Career Coach about your goals and gaps.
home.step2Desc: Turn that guidance into an ATS-optimized resume.
home.step3Desc: Generate a tailored cover letter backed by real company research.
home.step4Desc: Submit your application with a message to the hiring team — no middleman.
home.testimonialsSubtitle: We're just getting started — every story here will come from a real candidate or employer, never a stock quote.
home.pricingTeaserSubtitle: Start free. Unlock AI tools when you're ready.
home.pricingFreeDesc: Forever free — browse jobs, apply, and see your AI Match %.
home.pricingPremiumDesc: AI Resume Builder, Cover Letter Generator, ATS scoring, and more.
home.faqQ1: Is JobConnect AI free to use?
home.faqA1: Yes. Browsing jobs, applying, and your AI Match % are free. Premium ($19/mo) unlocks the AI Resume Builder, Cover Letter Generator, and ATS scoring.
home.faqA2: A score comparing the skills on your profile with each job's real listed tags — so you can see how well you fit before you apply.
home.faqQ3: Do employers see my email or phone number?
home.faqA3: No. Your contact details stay private — employers only see what you choose to share in your application message.
home.faqQ4: Which AI models power the tools?
home.faqA4: Our Resume Builder, Cover Letter Generator, and Career Coach run on GPT-4o for Premium members, and Mistral for free-tier generations.
home.faqA5: Yes — cancel anytime from Stripe billing, no long-term contract.
home.ctaTitle: Ready to land your dream remote job?
home.ctaSubtitle: Build your profile, browse real openings, and let our AI tools help you put your best foot forward.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.draftNoticeBody: This page describes our current data practices in plain language, but has not yet been finalized with legal counsel. It will be reviewed and finalized before public launch.
privacy.overviewBody: JobConnect AI is a remote job platform that connects candidates with employers using AI-assisted tools. This policy explains what information we collect, how it's used, and who can see it.
privacy.collectAccountBody: your email address and password (used only for authentication), and whether you signed up as a candidate or an employer.
privacy.collectProfileBody: full name, professional title, bio, work experience, skills, education, location, years of experience, availability, work preference, LinkedIn/GitHub/portfolio links, and a profile photo, if you choose to add them.
privacy.collectPhoneBody: optional, and kept private — it is never shown to employers or other users.
privacy.collectApplicationsBody: the jobs you apply to and any message you include are shared with the employer who posted that job.
privacy.collectEmployerBody: company name and job postings, if you have an employer account.
privacy.collectPaymentBody: if you subscribe to Premium, payments are processed by Stripe. We do not store your card details.
privacy.aiToolsBody: The AI Resume Builder and AI Cover Letter Generator send the information you enter into those tools (target role, experience, skills, etc.) to a third-party AI provider to generate content — OpenAI for Premium accounts, or Mistral AI for free accounts. This data is used only to generate your requested content and is not used to train these providers’ models on our behalf.
privacy.whoSeesBody1: Employers with an account can view your candidate profile — name, title, bio, skills, experience, education, location, links, photo, availability, and years of experience.
privacy.whoSeesBody1Bold: Your email and phone number are never shown to employers.
privacy.whoSeesBody1End: An employer only sees your application message if you apply to one of their job postings.
privacy.whoSeesBody2: Your profile photo, if you upload one, is stored in cloud storage that is reachable via a direct link — treat it like any other public profile picture, and avoid uploading anything you wouldn't want to be publicly viewable.
privacy.storageBody: Your data is stored with Supabase, our database and infrastructure provider, and is protected by row-level access rules that restrict most information to your own account unless explicitly shared as described above (e.g. with an employer you applied to).
privacy.rightsBody: You can review and update most of your information at any time from your <profileSettings>profile settings</profileSettings>. To request a copy of your data or to delete your account, contact us using the details below.
privacy.changesBody: We may update this policy as JobConnect AI evolves. Material changes will be reflected by updating the date at the top of this page.
privacy.contactBody: Questions about this policy or your data? Reach out via our <contactPage>Contact page</contactPage>.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.draftNoticeBody: These terms describe our current practices in plain language, but have not yet been finalized with legal counsel. They will be reviewed and finalized before public launch.
terms.acceptanceBody: By creating an account or using JobConnect AI, you agree to these terms. If you don't agree, please don't use the service.
terms.descriptionBody: JobConnect AI is a remote job platform connecting candidates and employers, with AI-assisted tools for resume building, cover letter generation, and candidate discovery.
terms.accountsBody: You choose a candidate or employer account when you sign up. You're responsible for keeping your login credentials secure and for the accuracy of the information you provide — including your profile details and, for employers, your job postings.
terms.candidateFeaturesBody: Candidates can browse and apply to job postings, and use the AI Resume Builder and AI Cover Letter Generator to help draft application materials.
terms.employerFeaturesBody: Employers can post jobs and browse candidate profiles. Employers only see the professional information a candidate has chosen to add to their profile — never a candidate's email address or phone number.
terms.premiumBody: The Premium plan ($19/month) unlocks the AI Resume Builder and AI Cover Letter Generator with GPT-4o, and is billed through Stripe. You can cancel anytime; access continues until the end of the current billing period.
terms.aiContentBody: Content produced by the AI Resume Builder and AI Cover Letter Generator is generated automatically and provided as a starting point. You're responsible for reviewing it for accuracy before using it in a real application — we don't guarantee the accuracy of AI-generated content or any job outcome.
terms.acceptableUseBody: Don't use JobConnect AI to post fraudulent or discriminatory job listings, submit false information, spam other users, or attempt to scrape or misuse other users' data.
terms.yourContentBody: You retain ownership of the profile information, applications, and job postings you submit. By using the service, you grant JobConnect AI the license needed to display that content to the other party it's intended for (e.g. showing your candidate profile to employers, or your job posting to candidates).
terms.terminationBody: You may stop using JobConnect AI and request account deletion at any time. We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms.
terms.disclaimersBody: JobConnect AI is provided "as is," without warranties of any kind. We're not liable for hiring decisions, job outcomes, or the accuracy of AI-generated or user-submitted content.
terms.governingLawBody: [Governing law and jurisdiction to be specified by JobConnect AI.]
terms.changesBody: We may update these terms as JobConnect AI evolves. Material changes will be reflected by updating the date at the top of this page.
terms.contactBody: Questions about these terms? Reach out via our <contactPage>Contact page</contactPage>.

aboutPage.title: About JobConnect AI
aboutPage.subtitle: AI-powered remote job platform connecting top candidates with leading companies worldwide.
aboutPage.missionText: Remote hiring is still harder than it should be — candidates spend hours reformatting resumes for every application, and employers dig through profiles that don't tell them what they need to know. JobConnect AI exists to close that gap: helping candidates put their best foot forward with AI-assisted tools, and giving employers a clear, honest view of who they're hiring, remotely, from anywhere.
aboutPage.whatWeDoText: Candidates can browse remote job listings, build a real profile — skills, experience, location, availability — and use AI tools to draft a tailored resume or cover letter for a specific role in seconds. Employers get a straightforward way to post jobs and browse candidate profiles without wading through noise, while candidates keep control over what stays private (like their email and phone number).
aboutPage.whereWeAreText: JobConnect AI is early — we're building it in the open, one feature at a time, and actively shaping it based on what actually works rather than chasing a polished-looking launch. If something feels rough around the edges, that's because it's a young product, not a finished one.
aboutPage.whoText: JobConnect AI is built by a solo founder/developer, end to end — product, design, and engineering. That means decisions get made quickly, but it also means we're a small team of one for now. If you run into something that doesn't work, or have an idea for what would make this more useful to you, reaching out actually reaches someone.
aboutPage.getInTouchText: Questions, feedback, or just want to say hello? Visit our Contact page — we read everything.

forCompaniesPage.title: For Companies
forCompaniesPage.subtitle: Hire remote talent with a clear, honest view of who you're bringing on.
forCompaniesPage.postJobsText: Create an employer account to post remote job listings and browse candidate profiles — skills, experience, education, location, availability, and links to their work. No noise, no filler: just what candidates have chosen to share about themselves.
forCompaniesPage.privacyText: A candidate's email address and phone number are never shown to employers. When you want to reach someone, you do it through the application they've submitted to your job posting — their contact details stay theirs to control.
forCompaniesPage.whereWeAreText: JobConnect AI is a young, actively developed product — not a large, established platform. That also means feedback goes directly to the person building it, and changes based on what employers actually need happen fast, not after months of process.
